message:
test(proptest): add 58 property tests for workflows coordination, descriptors, and handlers

Coverage for 3 previously untested workflow submodules:
- proptest_workflows_coordination.rs (27 tests): PaneGroupStrategy, PaneGroup,
  BroadcastPrecondition, PaneBroadcastOutcome, BroadcastResult, GroupLockConflict,
  CoordinateAgentsConfig, CoordinationResult, UnstickFindingKind, UnstickFinding,
  UnstickConfig, UnstickReport — serde roundtrips + structural invariants
- proptest_workflows_descriptors.rs (13 tests): DescriptorTrigger, DescriptorFailureHandler,
  DescriptorMatcher, DescriptorControlKey, DescriptorStep, WorkflowDescriptor —
  serde roundtrips + validation invariants + interpolation properties
- proptest_workflows_handlers.rs (18 tests): SessionStartCassHintsLookup,
  AuthCassHintsLookup, AuthRecoveryStrategy, DeviceAuthStepOutcome,
  ResumeSessionConfig, ResumeSessionOutcome, FallbackReason, FallbackNextStepPlan —
  serde roundtrips + default invariants + Display coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
